rules: When citing or linking to documentation pages, always use the public docs URL on https://lindo.ai/docs/ instead of the GitHub source URL (github.com/lindoai/lindo-docs).
To build a citation link, take the file path from the GitHub source, drop the leading 'docs/articles/' if present, and drop the '.mdx' or '.md' extension, then prepend 'https://lindo.ai/docs/'.
Example: the source 'github.com/lindoai/lindo-docs/blob/main/mcp-agents/mcp-server.mdx' must be cited as 'https://lindo.ai/docs/mcp-agents/mcp-server'.
Never show raw github.com URLs, blob/main paths, or .mdx/.md file extensions in user-facing answers. Links must always resolve to the live Lindo docs site.
For the docs home or overview, link to 'https://lindo.ai/docs/overview'. For the API section, use 'https://lindo.ai/docs/api/introduction' and similar subpaths under 'https://lindo.ai/docs/'.
